tools.name: claimhit_search
tools.description: Search for products or technical standards that potentially infringe a given patent. Runs multiple AI models in parallel and returns ranked results with Hit Scores. Use this when asked to find infringers, check infringement, or screen a patent.

tools.name: claimhit_get_credits
tools.description: Check how many search credits and chart credits the user has remaining.

tools.name: claimhit_get_history
tools.description: Get the user's recent patent scans. Returns patent numbers, dates, and top results from past searches.

tools.name: claimhit_get_result
tools.description: Get full results from a previous ClaimHit search by search ID.

tools.name: claimhit_generate_chart
tools.description: Generate an AI Hit Chart for a specific target (product or standard) from a previous search. A Hit Chart maps patent claim elements to product features element-by-element with evidence. Requires a search_id and target name. Use this when the user asks to chart, map claims, or analyse a specific targ

tools.name: claimhit_rerun_search
tools.description: Re-run a previous patent search to get fresh results. Free within 6 months of the original search. Use when the user wants to refresh results or check if new infringers have appeared.
